svg.title: Latent world model architecture diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end pipeline: KTH frames are encoded by a VAE into spatial latents, two dynamics models (ConvLSTM and Spatial Transformer) predict future latents autoregressively, and the VAE decoder reconstructs predicted frames.

g.text: Conv2d ×4 → μ, σ → sample z (128-ch spatial latent)

svg.text: EMA smoothing · latent clamp [−3.5, 3.5] · decode ONCE at end
Evaluated with SSIM ↑ and LPIPS ↓ against ground-truth future frames
